title: Lenor Wellbeing Collection Fabric Conditioner 1.65L, 50 Washes, Big Value Pack, 3-Pack (Energize - Citrus & White Verbena, Love - Exotic Bloom & Moonlight Lily, Breathe - Ocean Mist)
features: VARIETY PACK: Contains three unique fragrances - Energize with citrus & white verbena, Love with exotic bloom & moonlight lily, and Breathe with ocean mist
LONG-LASTING: Each bottle provides 50 washes, offering excellent value with a total of 150 washes across the collection
ESSENTIAL OILS: Enhanced with a touch of essential oils for a luxurious and aromatic laundry experience
GENEROUS SIZE: Each bottle contains 1.65L of fabric conditioner in a convenient easy-pour format
WELLBEING COLLECTION: Specially formulated scents designed to enhance your mood - energising citrus, romantic floral, and refreshing ocean
description: Product description Transform your laundry experience with this luxurious trio of fabric conditioners from the Lenor Wellbeing Collection. Each big value pack delivers 50 washes of sumptuous softness and captivating fragrances. Energize your senses with the vibrant blend of Citrus & White Verbena, indulge in the romantic essence of Love with its Exotic Bloom & Moonlight Lily scent, or find tranquility with Breathe's refreshing Ocean Mist aroma. Enhanced with essential oils, these fabric conditioners not only leave your clothes wonderfully soft but also create an uplifting sensory experience. The generous 1.65L bottles ensure long-lasting value, while the carefully crafted formulations help maintain the freshness of your garments. Perfect for those who appreciate both practical laundry care and sophisticated fragrances in their daily routines. Ingredients <5% Cationic Surfactants, Perfumes, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citronellol, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool Directions Add 1-2 capfuls (depending on load size) to the rinse cycle dispenser of your washing machine. For best results, use the recommended amount for your load size. Do not use in the dryer. See more
